title: Comcast REUP FOR SALE ransomware incident

extortion.description: REUP FOR SALE The archive contains samples of the Comcast leak. The total file size is approximately 2 TB. It includes numerous DWG drawings, PDF plans of various cities with infrastructure, and other files related to the Genesis project. The entire lot is being sold as a single lot. Please submit your contact information and suggestions via the feedback form.  https://corporate.comcast.com/
